title: RFC: move machine and bindings tests under test/
body:
Currently our main test suites are located in a subdirectory under test/, i.e. test/system or test/e2e.
The only exceptions are machine tests under pkg/machine/e2e/ and bindings tests under pkg/bindings/test/.

My proposal, move `pkg/machine/e2e` to `test/machine` and `pkg/bindings/test` to `test/bindings`.

The motivation for this is a to make the tests better grouped and easier to discover where to add actual integration test style tests. Unit tests of course stay the way they are right next to the main code in _test.go files.

In addition it is harder to special handle these paths in our our CI path skip rules,in fact since the CI rework they are not handled at all, see `.github/filters.yaml`. The rule `'!(test/**)**/*.@(go|c|h)'` will skip code changes under test/, I was unable to make this rule work for several directories, I likely could make it work somehow but it would create even more complicated to reason about skip rules. So right now a change in only pkg/machine/e2e will trigger the full CI which is just a waste of resources and time. Moving them under test/ would solve this naturally.
